# croft-pwa

> A meta-site about building Croft SPA/PWAs: the standards and a reference
> implementation in one repo, itself a Croft PWA built to the standards it
> documents.

## Start here

- [Agent guide](/AGENTS.md): the front door for building a Croft PWA.
- [Operating manual](/CLAUDE.md): conventions and the gate for working in this repo.

## Standards

- [Design & brand](/docs/DESIGN.md): tokens, palette, WCAG, navigation law.
- [Security](/docs/SECURITY.md): build-time CSP, Subresource Integrity, threat posture.
- [Practices](/docs/PRACTICES.md): the gate, service worker, TDD, plans & RUN summaries.

## Reference implementations

- arecipe — https://arecipe.app/ (TDD method, brand-token discipline)
- skylite — https://github.com/CroftCommunity/skylite (atproto/PDA stack)
